about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Founded 2014 · Comprehensive engineering partner in India
about.description: With advanced technology and Korean quality management, we deliver MEP, utility, electrical, fire protection, and IT infrastructure works as a trusted partner for global companies including Samsung, Kia, and Hyosung across India.
about.intro: Since our founding in 2014, we have been realizing our customers' dreams with advanced technology, relentless challenge, and responsible management in India.

ceoMessage.label: CEO Message
ceoMessage.title: CEO Statement
ceoMessage.message: WINAJES Construction, a leader in India's construction history, realizes our customers' dreams with the highest technology and quality through relentless challenge and passion, change and innovation, trust and cooperation. WINAJES has always been there during the rapid economic growth of Korean companies in India over the past decade. We have contributed to company stability through factory construction, achieved sustainable growth based on dozens of design and construction experiences, and led with integrity and superior technology. Going forward, WINAJES will thoroughly prepare to create environments and spaces of value beyond construction, for the highest corporate value and a better life.
ceoMessage.name: Sungkwang Lee

visionMission.visionDescription: Growing together with our clients, we strive to become a global engineering partner that creates value beyond construction through technological innovation and quality management at industrial sites across India.
visionMission.missionIntro: WINAJES is guided by three core values in every project we deliver.

missionItems.title: Challenge & Passion
missionItems.description: We pursue new possibilities through continuous technical development and field execution, bringing our best passion to every project.

missionItems.title: Autonomy & Responsibility
missionItems.description: Every team member works with ownership and autonomy, taking clear responsibility for safety, quality, and schedule.

missionItems.title: Trust & Cooperation
missionItems.description: We build long-term trusted relationships through transparent communication and mutual respect with clients, partners, and local teams.
